notes: The Information Security Forum is a members-only association that publishes the Standard of Good Practice for Information Security (SOGP), a comprehensive controls catalog widely used by ISF member organizations.

data.official_name: Standard of Good Practice for Information Security
data.description: Comprehensive information-security controls catalog maintained by the ISF for member organizations. Members-only license; not publicly redistributable.
